author: runner-9
rationale: Input pin only (P2 P-9: a PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholder completed by ops amendment before any final-phase run; no design field is touched — the replace target /pins/corpus_hashes/mathlib-1000-sample carries the placeholder 'PINNED-AT-INPUTS:d-ml (1,000-declaration random Mathlib crawl; ops amendment before any final run)' pre-declared in the frozen g8 record). The d-ml sample data/mathlib-1000-sample/ is now committed: 1000 lean-ref/1 declaration records (records.jsonl) from a random Mathlib crawl at mathlib commit e3b73828b03c9961c9b33aa95f1d2dc0dca82028, plus its extractor (extract.mjs), crawl manifest, fetch-log, sample seed list and source snapshot. This ops amendment resolves that placeholder in pins.corpus_hashes to the kot-corpus-hash/1 digest of data/mathlib-1000-sample/ (tools/registry/corpus-pin.py mathlib-1000-sample = 9c2a3a888b98593d999adb65c7a32cba0cdbf092bcdb5f2b9c738e4cff2a80c2), covering every regular file under that tree. verdict-gen applies this as an overlay on the frozen record in seq order before readout; the frozen file, its frozen_sha256 anchor and every design field are byte-untouched. One-shot pin discipline: any change to those bytes before the final-phase run invalidates this value and requires a pre-run correction record, not a new ops amendment.
